subject: Geography
title: Cave of Crystals in Bermuda
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Cave of Crystals in Bermuda.

hook.text: Bermuda's Crystal Cave was found in 1907 by two boys chasing a lost cricket ball.

buildup.text: They lowered themselves through a hole and found a lake surrounded by stalactites and crystals.

discovery.text: The cave sits below sea level. Its crystal-clear lake rises and falls with the ocean tide.

twist.text: Bermuda itself sits on a volcanic seamount. The caves formed as coral limestone dissolved.

climax.text: A cricket ball led to a discovery that revealed Bermuda's hidden geological past.

punchline.text: The greatest discoveries start with a lost ball and a curious kid.

quiz.question: How was Bermuda's Crystal Cave discovered?
options: Two boys found it while chasing a lost cricket ball
A mining company drilled into it
